caption: A woman with dark hair tied up in a bun and styled in braids on the sides speaks into a professional black microphone. She is wearing a dark green t-shirt with a red graphic and text that includes the word "COTTING." She is positioned in a studio setting against a black backdrop featuring white and red text, including "BOSS TALK 101," "It's A League Hustle," "AST," and "about It!". To her right, a framed picture of a man's hands is visible on the wall. On the table in front of her are small items and two red and white logos that read "BOSS TALK 101." Throughout the sequence, the woman remains in the same position, speaking while slightly shifting her head and changing her facial expression, while the camera remains static, capturing her from the chest up.
